sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_records (value String, array_values Array(Int64)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY value;
SELECT toInt64OrDefault(array_values[1], CAST(NULL, 'Int64')) AS first_element, toInt64OrDefault(value, CAST(-1, 'Int64')) FROM test_records WHERE toInt64OrDefault(value, CAST(0, 'Int64')) < 0;

SELECT value, array_values[2] AS second_value, toInt64OrDefault(array_values[array_values.size() - 1], CAST(100, 'Int64')) AS last_value FROM test_records GROUP BY value, second_value HAVING last_value > 0;
SELECT value, SUM(toInt64OrDefault(array_values[1], CAST(0, 'Int64'))) AS total FROM test_records WHERE toInt64OrDefault(value, CAST(0, 'Int64')) = 0 GROUP BY value ORDER BY total DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT toInt64OrDefault(array_values[3], CAST(0, 'Int64')) AS distinct_value FROM (SELECT value, array_values FROM test_records WHERE value NOT LIKE 'abc') AS filtered_records;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count, toInt64OrDefault(SUM(toInt64OrDefault(value, CAST(0, 'Int64'))), CAST(0, 'Int64')) FROM test_records WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT value, toInt64OrDefault(value, CAST(0, 'Int64')) AS converted_value FROM test_records WHERE toInt64OrDefault(value, CAST(-1, 'Int64')) > -1 OR value = 'NaN';
